extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports “By our Company,” “By our Directors,” and “By our Promoters” rows, all of which are excluded; against rows show criminal proceedings as Nil for the company, directors and promoters, statutory/regulatory proceedings as Nil, tax proceedings of 22 against the company, 1 against directors and 1 against promoters, and no other material proceedings against the company or directors. For the required tax count, only the company row is counted, giving 22; the quantified aggregate against the company is the stated ₹1,101.25 lakhs, while the company tax matters are described as pre-litigation with no amount involved and no separate subsidiary row is disclosed, so the amount converts to ₹11.0125 crore (1,101.25 lakhs ÷ 100). The contingent-liabilities table states ₹4,165.73 lakhs as outstanding bank guarantees at December 31, 2025; this stated figure is used without re-summing and converts to ₹41.6573 crore. Company-wide customer concentration for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2025, is 63.72% for the top five and 77.56% for the top ten, measured against revenue from operations; the source monetary tables use ₹ lakhs, converted to crore by dividing by 100.
